Drawing Accuracy Tool

Assess drawing and writing accuracy through interactive drawing

Draw These Letters

The letters below are selected for dyslexia screening. Ask the child to draw each letter on the canvas.

Letters are chosen from mirror, similar-shape, and sound-confusing groups used in dyslexia detection.

Draw the prompt

Use phone or tablet for touch drawing. Use the eraser to fix mistakes.
